No Poverty.reason: The course provides knowledge on property ownership and investment (Target 1.4), which can indirectly contribute to economic resources, but doesn't explicitly focus on poverty eradication or vulnerable groups.
evidence: 不動產購屋自住與投資之專業知識

Zero Hunger.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to hunger, food security, or sustainable agriculture.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to health, well-being, or disease prevention.

Quality Education.reason: As a university course, it directly provides tertiary education (Target 4.3) and professional knowledge for future employment (Target 4.4).

Gender Equality.reason: The course provides knowledge on property ownership and financial services, which could indirectly empower women to control economic resources (Target 5.a), though gender equality is not explicitly mentioned.
evidence: 不動產購屋自住與投資之專業知識

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to water, sanitation, or hygiene.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to energy access, renewable energy, or energy efficiency.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course explicitly prepares students for '就業工作' (employment) in real estate (Target 8.5) and covers '不動產金融商品' (real estate financial products), relating to financial services (Target 8.10).
evidence: 對學生在未來生活或就業工作上具有極大價值

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course's focus on '不動產市場發展' (real estate market development) and '不動產市場分析' (real estate market analysis) provides foundational knowledge relevant to infrastructure planning and financing (Target 9.1).

Reduced Inequalities.reason: The course examines '不動產政策' (real estate policy) and '不動產法制稅賦' (real estate legal system and taxation), which are fiscal tools that can be used to address inequalities (Target 10.4).

Sustainable Cities and Communities.reason: The course's core focus on '不動產購屋自住與投資' (real estate purchase for owner-occupancy and investment) and '不動產政策' (real estate policy) directly addresses adequate and affordable housing (Target 11.1).
evidence: 不動產購屋自住與投資

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to sustainable consumption, resource efficiency, or waste management.

Climate Action.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to climate change mitigation, adaptation, or resilience.

Life Below Water.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to marine ecosystems or ocean health.

Life on Land.reason: No evidence in the course syllabus directly relates to terrestrial ecosystems, biodiversity, or land degradation.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course explicitly covers '不動產法制稅賦與制度' (real estate legal system and taxation) and '不動產政策' (real estate policy), which are fundamental to the rule of law and effective institutions (Targets 16.3, 16.6).
evidence: 不動產法制稅賦與制度

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The course's coverage of '不動產法制稅賦' (real estate legal system and taxation) is relevant to domestic resource mobilization, as property taxes are a key source of government revenue (Target 17.1).
